title: glechoma ispahanica
intro: Glechoma ispahanica, also known as Persian balm or creeping charlie, is a perennial herb native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Glechoma ispahanica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Glechoma ispahanica can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or applied topically in the form of creams and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
